steps.title: Cool the burn
steps.desc: Hold under cool (not cold) running water for 10-15 minutes.

steps.title: Remove tight items
steps.desc: Remove rings or other tight items from the burned area.

steps.title: Apply lotion
steps.desc: Once a burn is completely cooled, apply aloe vera or burn gel.

steps.title: Bandage loosely
steps.desc: Cover the burn with a sterile gauze bandage.
